name: workshop
notes: relaxed_work_loss_guards codifies the repo's written relaxed-git posture (docs/agentic/GIT_WORKFLOW.md): work-loss guards stay allow below wave_mode; the flag is ignored at T4/wave_mode. 'merge: gated' means the self-review gate in docs/agentic/REVIEW_GATE.md. On Chris's machine the global floor (~/.claude/hooks/dispatch.py) rides above this repo copy; the repo copy makes worktrees and volunteer clones self-contained.
